nodes.name: Webhook — Deal Closed
nodes.notes: Triggered when a deal is marked as closed/won — either from CRM, manually, or from workflow 06. Payload: { clientName, clientEmail, clientPhone, businessType, numProperties, packageTier }

nodes.name: Set — Normalize Client Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes client data and generates a unique client ID.

parameters.subject: =Selamat Bergabung dengan PropertyFollow! Form Onboarding Anda 🎉
parameters.html:
=

Selamat bergabung, {{ $json.clientName }}! 🎉

Terima kasih sudah mempercayakan otomasi properti Anda kepada PropertyFollow!

Paket Anda: {{ $json.packageTier }}
Client ID: {{ $json.clientId }}

Untuk memulai proses setup, kami perlu beberapa informasi dari Anda. Mohon isi form onboarding berikut:

Isi Form Onboarding →

Form ini membutuhkan waktu sekitar 10-15 menit. Siapkan:
• Akun WhatsApp Business Anda
• Akses OTA (Airbnb, Booking.com)
• Detail properti (foto, harga, fasilitas)

Ada pertanyaan? Balas email ini atau WhatsApp kami di {{ $env.ADMIN_PHONE }}.

Salam,
Tim PropertyFollow

nodes.name: Email — Send Onboarding Form to Client
nodes.notes: Sends branded onboarding email with form link. The form URL includes client_id and email as query params for auto-fill. Env: AGENCY_EMAIL, ONBOARDING_FORM_URL, ADMIN_PHONE.

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $json.clientPhone }}","type":"text","text":{"body":"Halo {{ $json.clientName }}! 🎉

Selamat bergabung dengan PropertyFollow!

Kami sudah mengirimkan form onboarding ke email {{ $json.clientEmail }}.

Mohon isi form tersebut agar kami bisa mulai setup sistem untuk Anda.

Ada pertanyaan? Balas pesan ini! 😊"}}

nodes.name: HTTP — Notify Client via WhatsApp
nodes.notes: Sends a WhatsApp nudge to the client to check their email and fill the form.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Create Client Record
nodes.notes: Creates the client record in the Clients sheet. Status starts as 'onboarding'.

nodes.name: Webhook — Receive Form Submission
nodes.notes: Second trigger: receives form submission data from Typeform/Google Forms webhook. Configure your form to POST to this endpoint. Expected fields: clientId, propertyName, address, otaAccess, whatsappNumber, checkInTime, checkOutTime, baseRate, amenities, specialInstructions.

nodes.name: Set — Structure Form Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes the form submission data into a standard structure.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Update Client with Form Data
nodes.notes: Updates the client record with all property details from the form submission.

parameters.name: Body

nodes.name: HTTP — Notify Internal Team to Start Setup
nodes.notes: Alerts the internal team via WhatsApp that the client has completed onboarding and setup can begin. Env: INTERNAL_TEAM_PHONE.

parameters.subject: =Form Onboarding Diterima — Setup Dimulai! ✅
parameters.html:
=

Form Anda sudah kami terima! ✅

Halo,

Terima kasih telah mengisi form onboarding untuk {{ $json.propertyName }}.

Tim kami sudah mulai menyiapkan sistem automasi Anda. Estimasi setup: 5-7 hari kerja.

Kami akan menghubungi Anda saat sistem sudah siap untuk testing.

Ada pertanyaan? Balas email ini atau WhatsApp kami.
Tim PropertyFollow

nodes.name: Email — Send Onboarding Confirmation to Client
nodes.notes: Sends confirmation email to client that onboarding is received and setup has started.

main.node: Email — Send Onboarding Form to Client
Google Sheets — Update Client with Form Data
HTTP — Notify Internal Team to Start Setup
Email — Send Onboarding Confirmation to Client

meta.description: Two-phase onboarding: (1) Deal closed → send form + notify client. (2) Form submitted → update record + notify team + confirm to client. Env vars: GOOGLE_SHEET_ID, AGENCY_EMAIL, ADMIN_PHONE, ONBOARDING_FORM_URL, WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN, INTERNAL_TEAM_PHONE.
